Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay
Off Calendar Aug-02-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT METRO SERVICES GROUP, INC.'S Motion To Stay is off calendar as moot. On July 15, 2013, the Honorable Judge Spero granted Norma Granados' motion to dismiss Metro Services Group's complaint for declaratory and injunctive relief in United States District Court, Northern District of California. Discovery in this case is now re-opened. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Arlene Howell CSR2542.
